WASHINGTON, D. c., Oct. q
Ho, We homeseekers, hike for the
west!


Uncle Sam is planning to distrib-
ute during the coming year nearly
100000 acres of land to about 35,-
600 people. How would you like
to one of the number?


This will be the biggest distribu-
ton made by the United States
government since Oklahoma was
opened for settlement. The land is
located on eight different Indian
reservation in four states. Nearly
all of it is regarded as first class
for farming purposes.


While the regulations for it's dis
posal have so far been announced
for only one reservation, it has
been decided to open all of the
tracts by the lottery system. The
reservations, with their acreage,
follow:


Lower Brule, South Dakota. S.
$50 acres; Rosebud, South Dakota,
$4,000 acres; Flathead. Montana,
